name: regul8d-caffein8d
description: Regul8d Caffein8d (T1NKER) — watch collecting content brand. Vintage watches, mechanical watch regulation, homage watches, bench work, and honest hobby commentary.

scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install --omit=optional && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.start: cd server && npm i && npm start

author: Gonzalo Romero
